narrative:
Cols 39-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 461 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.9 percentage points.
